'''√p-ch-ch''' ('''kapachach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debleat|debleat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debleat|debleat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-ch-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kapachach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thipachach || jipachach || shipachach || kipachach
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthupachach || jujupachach || shushupachach || kukupachach
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thupachach || jupachach || shupachach || kupachach
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thupachach || jupachach || shupachach || kupachach
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thepachach || jepachach || shepachach || kepachach
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothopachach || jojopachach || shoshopachach || kokopachach
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thopachach || jopachach || shopachach || kopachach
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thopachach || jopachach || shopachach || kopachach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pachach || pachach || pachach || pachach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pachach || pachach || pachach || pachach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pachach || pachach || pachach || pachach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pachach || pachach || pachach || pachach
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæpachach || jæpachach || shæpachach || kæpachach
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathapachach || jajapachach || shashapachach || kakapachach
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thapachach || japachach || shapachach || kapachach
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thapachach || japachach || shapachach || kapachach
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shapachach
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshapachach
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishapachach
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shapachachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshapachachnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishapachachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shapachachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshapachachnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishapachachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shapachachro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshapachachnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishapachachro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shapachachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshapachachnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishapachachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shapachachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshapachachnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishapachachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shapachachng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshapachachnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishapachachng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shapachachya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshapachachnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishapachachya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shapachachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshapachachnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishapachachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shapachachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshapachachnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishapachachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shapachachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapachachnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapachachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shapachachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshapachachnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapachachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shapachachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshapachachnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishapachachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shapachachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapachachnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapachachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shapachachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshapachachnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapachachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shapachachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshapachachnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishapachachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shapachachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshapachachnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishapachachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shapachachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshapachachnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapachachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shapachachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshapachachnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishapachachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shapachachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshapachachnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishapachachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shapachachmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapachachnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapachachmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
